title: Tragic 911 details from the final minutes of UFO expert David Wilcock’s life after cops respond to his call for help
description: TRAGIC details from the last moments of a tormented UFO expert's life have been revealed after cops released a partial transcript of his 911 call. David Wilcock, 53, called 911 on Monday morning and spoke of issues with his health and finances just minutes before he died by suicide. Wilcock died from a gunshot wound...

title: WATCH: Congressman Says He's Seen Stunning Classified UFO Reports 'That Defy Any Reason'
description: Rep. Tim Burchett (R-TN) this week cited alarming classified reports of UFOs he has seen following President Donald Trump's tease of a pending release of government files on the phenomena by the Pentagon. The post WATCH: Congressman Says He’s Seen Stunning Classified UFO Reports ‘That Defy Any Reason’ appeared first on Breitbart .

title: Pentagon UFO Files Leak Claims 'Non-Human Craft' Hidden in Secret Programme Denied to Top Officials
description: Leaked claims and insider testimony suggest the US government may secretly hold non-human technology, with allegations of a classified program handling recovered UFOs and potential biological entities.
